title: BEM-1211 provider integrity
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_provider_policy_integrity.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

REGISTRY = Path("governance/providers/providers_registry.json")
POLICY = Path("governance/providers/contour_provider_policy.json")


def validate():
    registry = json.loads(REGISTRY.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    policy = json.loads(POLICY.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    errors = []
    providers = {item.get("id"): item for item in registry.get("providers", [])}
    for required in ["gpt", "claude_external", "mock"]:
        if required not in providers:
            errors.append(f"missing provider {required}")
    for pid, meta in providers.items():
        if meta.get("secrets_in_repo") is not False:
            errors.append(f"{pid}: secrets_in_repo must be false")
    contours = {item.get("contour") for item in policy.get("policies", [])}
    if contours != {"C1", "C2", "C3"}:
        errors.append(f"provider policies must cover C1/C2/C3, got {sorted(contours)}")
    for item in policy.get("policies", []):
        if item.get("primary") == "mock":
            errors.append(f"{item.get('contour')}: mock cannot be primary")
        if item.get("fallback") == "mock" and item.get("fallback_allowed_only_for") != "mock_e2e":
            errors.append(f"{item.get('contour')}: mock fallback must be mock_e2e only")
    return errors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    errs = validate()
    if errs:
        print("FAIL")
        for err in errs:
            print(err)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print("PASS provider_policy_integrity")
